title: May work if you’re in your 20s!
body: I’m in my 50s. Have hormonal pigmentation spots. Been using this for 5 months now. Twice a day, after cleansing etc Using 50++ SPF in the day and wearing hat when I go out etc. Tube is almost finished. Has not changed shade of pigmentation spots at all. I know this because I use a shade ruler to determine what shade my spots were when I first started. At the end, still the same. Boo.

title: Not for me
body: I have oily skin on my face which lead to hormonal acne & dark spots. While treating my acne I needed something to clear the dark spots as well. I ran across this product, the reviews were mostly positive so I was hoping for the best. I was consistently on my second tube but still had no results so, I eventually stopped and started using sunscreen which became effective within a week. I even did research on mixing other products to prevent any reactions or no results at all. This honestly felt like a waste of money. Maybe it only works for certain ppl or skin types.
date: Reviewed in the United States on 9 March 2026
author: Shaun

title: Does it really need to be $25?
body: This is a nice product. Its light and absorbs quickly but it's effectiveness leaves much to be desired. It's $25 but not nearly as effective at combating hyperpigmentation as other, more inexpensive products I use, like a separate tranexamic acid serum that honestly does most of the heavy lifting for boosting my skin's glow by itself. This product is nice but doesn't do much for my skin aside from lightly moisturizing it. Not worth $25 at all..
date: Reviewed in the United States on 15 March 2026

title: Per me ❌

Penso che gli effetti sulle macchie durino finché metti la crema,io comunque non li ho visti sulle mie…Poi costa raga, ci son creme simili ma con SPF che secondo me rendono di più. 😘

title: Potent Brightener With lighter textures
body: The cream is deeply hydrating and leaves my skin feeling very nourished, making it perfect for night use or for those with dry skin. The reason I deducted one star is the texture; it's quite thick and takes a little longer to fully absorb, leaving a slightly heavy feel, especially on warmer days. It's an outstanding product for its active ingredients and results, but I wish the consistency was just a little lighter for daytime wear.

title: Crema coreana promettente, ma da testare nel tempo
